sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102769" key="teqalui=a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθᾰλυῖα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθηλώς</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεθᾱλώς</orth>, <sense id="n102769.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θάλλω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
